faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get all your questions answered about our solution

q1.question: How does WhatsApp automation work?
q1.answer: We install an intelligent bot on your WhatsApp Business that automatically responds to messages, qualifies leads, schedules appointments, and much more. Everything works 24/7 without you having to do anything.

q2.question: Do I need to change my WhatsApp number?
q2.answer: No! We keep your current number. We handle all integration without interrupting your service.

q3.question: How long does implementation take?
q3.answer: Complete implementation in up to 7 business days. You start seeing results from the first week.

q4.question: What if my customers don't like the bot?
q4.answer: Our bot is designed to seem human and can transfer to human support at any time. Satisfaction rate: 98%.

q5.question: Does it work for any type of business?
q5.answer: Yes! We serve clinics, restaurants, stores, gyms, salons, real estate agencies, and more. We customize for your niche.

q6.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q6.answer: Yes, no penalties or fees. But we have a 30-day guarantee - if you don't like it, we refund 100% of your money.
